_description: 6-engine Vedic weight system for Vyapar Ratna AI. These weights govern the relative contribution of each Vedic/astrology engine within the total Vedic score portion. Technical analysis is applied separately on top of the Vedic composite.

1D._note: Intraday/daily: Prasna (horary) and Vyapar Ratna dominate. Slow planets irrelevant.

1W._note: Weekly: balanced Vedic emphasis. Prasna still relevant. Slow planets beginning to matter.

2W._note: Bi-weekly: Bhavartha and Kalamrita timing most relevant. Prasna fading.

1M._note: Monthly: slow-planet transits (Brihat) and Kalamrita Dasa cycles dominate. Prasna irrelevant.

3M._note: Quarterly: Brihat Samhita slow transits and Mundane cycles dominate. Prasna = 0.

category_technical_weight._note: Fraction of total score assigned to technical analysis. Remainder goes to the 6 Vedic engines blended by horizon_weights.

backtest_accuracy._note: Jyotish-only backtest results (90 trading days to Jan 2026). Random baseline = 33.3%. Results with 'both' mode (incl. technical) would be higher.
backtest_accuracy._methodology: Correct = signal matches actual price direction within ±0.5% threshold over the horizon period. Data source: yfinance historical closes.
_observations: Commodities and indices outperform equities — consistent with book's focus
GOLD 1W (44.3%) > GOLD 1D (40.5%) — Vyapar Ratna weekly rules are stronger
BANKNIFTY 1D best overall at +12pp above random baseline
Equity stocks underperform — Vyapar Ratna text primarily covers commodities/gold

vyapar_ratna.focus: Vaar, Tithi, Sankranti rules for Indian commodities

prasna.focus: Horary chart for moment of query; Gochara transits

bhavartha.focus: Dhanayoga, Rajayoga, Maraka combinations; Dasa timing

kalamrita.focus: Karakatvas, Dhana Yoga, Vimshottari Dasa, Prashna

brihat.focus: Jupiter/Saturn transits through signs; eclipse effects; commodity pricing

mundane.focus: Samvatsara, Ritu, Sankranti seasonal cycles; Indian market patterns
